category_sources: source_facts.description says Sourcery is meta-programming for Swift; official README describes it as a Swift code generator that removes boilerplate.
display_name_sources: Official krzysztofzablocki/Sourcery README uses the display name "Sourcery".
docs_sources: Official README links to full documentation hosted on krzysztofzablocki.github.io/Sourcery/; README is also an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/krzysztofzablocki/Sourcery; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, official README, and official docs describe Swift metaprogramming, template-based code generation, boilerplate removal, and CLI use.
